## Role Purpose

State why this role exists.

## Responsibilities

- [ ] responsibility 1
- [ ] responsibility 2
- [ ] responsibility 3

## Best Fit

Describe the kind of volunteer who would be successful in this role.

## Coverage Window

List the day, time, and shift expectations.

## Escalation

State what this role can decide and what must be escalated.

## Dependencies

List other leads, tools, or setup this role depends on.
